problem id: 9d8897e8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  00100000 -> 10000000
  00100110 -> 10011000
  01000110 -> 00011000
  01111110 -> 11111000
  00110011 -> 11001100
  00111000 -> 11100000
  10000111 -> 00011101
  00000110 -> 00011000
  11111110 -> 11111001
  10010001 -> 01000101

query: 10111110
predicted answer: 11111001
